assumptions.data_source: local deterministic price and factor generators; no external data fetch
assumptions.execution_timing: signals known after close; trades on rebalance dates using lagged signals; holdings affect next price row
assumptions.feature_timing: synthetic factor values are aligned to price dates before lagged backtest use
assumptions.slippage_model: not separately modeled; diagnostic synthetic smoke test only
assumptions.transaction_cost_model: 10.00 bps per unit of target-weight turnover

caveats: no live trading or brokerage integration
not evidence of real-world strategy performance
next_action: Use as a reproducible synthetic smoke-test log only; real-data readiness still requires explicit data interfaces, validation splits, liquidity assumptions, and slippage modeling.
summary: Deterministic synthetic smoke test that connects existing factor preprocessing and combination helpers to the existing long-only backtester with explicit signal lag and transaction costs.
title: Synthetic Combined-Score Backtest Smoke Test
